parameters.subject: We received your application — Master Apply
parameters.message:
MasterApply — ADS Immigration

Hi {{ $('Transform — Flatten Payload').first().json.first_name }},

Thank you for submitting your application through MasterApply. Our team at ADS Immigration has received your file and will review it within 1–2 business days.

Programs you selected:
{{ $('Transform — Flatten Payload').first().json.program_list.replace(/\n/g, '
') }}

Your GPA: {{ $('Transform — Flatten Payload').first().json.gpa }}
English Test: {{ $('Transform — Flatten Payload').first().json.test_type }} (IELTS equiv: {{ $('Transform — Flatten Payload').first().json.ielts_equivalent }})

If you have any questions in the meantime, reply to this email or WhatsApp us at +1 (XXX) XXX-XXXX.

Warm regards,
ADS Immigration Team

ADS Immigration · apply.adsimmigration.com
This email was sent because you submitted an application on our platform.
